title: sphenopholis nitida subsp. glabra
intro: Sphenopholis nitida subsp. glabra, also known as the Smooth Sphenopholis, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to help with wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Sphenopholis nitida subsp. glabra can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
